hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=os.path.basename(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath','file'))); os.chdir('C:/Users/laea1/Downloads/Claude code'); os.environ['PATH']='/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI:'+os.environ.get('PATH',''); subprocess.run(['git','add','-A']); r=subprocess.run(['git','diff','--cached','--quiet']); exit(0) if r.returncode==0 else (subprocess.run(['git','commit','-m','Update '+f]), subprocess.run(['git','push']))"
